title: Clear instructions: first, then, finally
subtitle: Guide someone through a simple task.
duolingoBridge: This turns grammar into useful speech: telling someone what to do step by step.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use sequence words to organize instructions.
Knowledge point 2: mix il faut and the imperative without making it heavy.

items.en: First, you have to open the app.
items.es: Primero hay que abrir la aplicación.

items.fr: Après ça, écoute chaque phrase deux fois.
items.en: After that, listen to each sentence twice.
items.es: Después de eso, escucha cada frase dos veces.

items.fr: N’oublie pas de répéter à voix haute.
items.en: Do not forget to repeat out loud.
items.es: No olvides repetir en voz alta.

items.fr: Finalement, écris deux phrases avec les mots nouveaux.
items.en: Finally, write two sentences with the new words.
items.es: Finalmente escribe dos frases con las palabras nuevas.
